overview: Advanced Functional Medicine of Austin provides personalized, holistic treatments that address the root causes of health issues rather than masking symptoms. The clinic offers BHRT, peptide therapy, nutritional IV infusions, gut restoration, weight loss programs, and anti-aging treatments through a comprehensive diagnostic approach and customized care plans.
targetAudience: Individuals seeking root-cause solutions for chronic conditions, hormonal imbalances, and metabolic issues who are looking beyond traditional symptom-management approaches.
